title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at L&T Infotech

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at L&T Infotech
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? L&T Infotech in Dhanbad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About L&T Infotech:
L&T Infotech is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Infotech!
